calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2001 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case dismissed entire action without prejudice. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: La Von Granger. (212)
